title: Kimchi Crunchie Fritters
description: A crispy keto fritter filled with spicy kimchi and crunchy bits
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together the crushed Crunchie and chopped kimchi.
3. Add the shredded cheese to the bowl and mix until well combined.
4. Use a spoon to drop small balls of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the fritters are golden brown.
